description: Evidence-backed as-of replay showing gradual KYC drift from enterprise BI software toward a leveraged Bitcoin treasury strategy.
reference_model: Enterprise Business Intelligence software and cloud analytics.

events.title: MicroStrategy announces capital allocation strategy: buyback plus alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin
events.evidence: Company says it may invest up to $250M in alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin.

events.title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
events.evidence: Company purchases 21,454 bitcoins and states Bitcoin is now the principal holding in treasury reserve strategy.

events.title: MicroStrategy closes $650M convertible note offering and intends to invest proceeds in Bitcoin
events.evidence: Net proceeds from convertible senior notes are intended for Bitcoin purchases under the Treasury Reserve Policy.

events.title: MicroStrategy buys an additional 19,452 bitcoins for $1.026B after issuing more convertible debt
events.evidence: Company now holds over 90,000 BTC and says it will continue acquiring Bitcoin with excess cash and possible debt/equity issuance.

events.title: MacroStrategy closes $205M Bitcoin-collateralized Silvergate loan to acquire additional Bitcoin
events.evidence: Subsidiary borrows against Bitcoin collateral; proceeds may be used to purchase more Bitcoin or for corporate purposes.

events.title: MicroStrategy reports $917.8M digital asset impairment and separates CEO/chairman roles so Saylor can focus on Bitcoin strategy
events.evidence: Company reports major Bitcoin impairment charge; Saylor moves to Executive Chairman to focus on Bitcoin acquisition strategy.
